customizeLookAndFeel: Customize the look and feel of ProxDash.
chooseLightDarkMode: Choose between light and dark mode, or follow your system setting.
chooseAccentColor: Choose an accent color for buttons, links, and highlights.
configureDataDisplay: Configure how data is displayed throughout the application.
selectLanguage: Select the display language for the interface.
manageTwoFactor: Manage two-factor authentication for your account.
addExtraLayerSecurity: Add an extra layer of security with a TOTP authenticator app.
fewRecoveryCodes: You have few recovery codes left. Consider regenerating them.
protectAccountTOTP: Protect your account with a TOTP authenticator.
step1ScanQRCode: Step 1: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
step2EnterCode: Step 2: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator
saveRecoveryCodes: Save these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator app.
disableTFADescription: Enter your current TOTP code to disable 2FA. This will remove the extra security layer from your account.
regenerateDescription: This will invalidate all existing recovery codes and generate new ones. Enter your current TOTP code to continue.
